onboarding.title: Set up your garage
onboarding.subtitle: One step before you begin.
onboarding.name: Your garage name
onboarding.error: Could not create. Please try again.

dashboard.setupIntro: Your workspace is ready. The following parts are coming soon.
dashboard.incomingEmpty: No requests yet. Share your form link below to get started.
dashboard.shareIntro: Share this link with your customers. Every request lands here automatically.
dashboard.daySummary: Today: {count} new requests, {urgent} urgent, {upcoming} appointments scheduled.
dashboard.robinIntro: I'm monitoring your calls, emails, WhatsApp messages and appointments. Nothing gets missed today.
dashboard.robinSummary: There are {count} new requests, {waiting} waiting for a reply and {upcoming} appointments scheduled.
dashboard.robinAsk: What would you like me to do?
dashboard.nudge: I see {count} customer(s) who have been waiting more than 30 minutes. Shall I take care of them?
dashboard.step1: Share your request form with customers.
dashboard.vehiclesSubtitle: What's on the shop floor right now.
dashboard.vehiclesEmpty: No vehicles being worked on yet.

robinChat.title: Robin
robinChat.subtitle: Ask what's happening in your garage.
robinChat.emptyHint: Try one of these questions, or type your own.
robinChat.suggestion1: How many appointments do I have tomorrow?

answers.apptsTomorrowNone: You have no appointments scheduled tomorrow.
answers.unansweredNone: Everyone already got a reply. Nice work.
answers.unansweredCount: {count} customer(s) are still waiting for a reply: {list}
answers.callWho: Which customer should I call? Try "Call John Smith".
answers.callNotFound: I couldn't find a customer with that name. Try the full name.
answers.callNoPhone: I don't have a phone number for {name}.
answers.callFound: {name}: {phone}. I can't place calls myself yet, but the number is ready for you.
answers.fallback: I can help with tomorrow's appointments, vehicles waiting, customers without a reply, or calling a customer. Try "Call [name]".

lead.proposeIntro: Pick a proposed time. You decide.
lead.noSlots: No free times found. Check your opening hours.
lead.alreadyBooked: This request already has an appointment.
lead.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

conversation.title: Conversation
conversation.handoff: Safety: this looks urgent. Contact the customer directly, no automatic reply.
conversation.note: You send it. Roavaa only proposes.

team.title: Team
team.inviteIntro: Add a colleague with a role.
team.inviteNote: The invitation is ready. Email delivery comes in a later step.

customers.title: Customers
customers.search: Search by name, phone or email
customers.empty: No customers yet. They appear here as requests come in.

vehicles.title: Vehicles
vehicles.search: Search by plate, make or model

settings.title: Settings
settings.name: Name
settings.hoursIntro: Controls which times Roavaa can propose.
settings.servicesIntro: Duration and buffer shape the proposed times.

knowledge.title: Knowledge base
knowledge.intro: Your garage's know-how. Roavaa will use it later to answer better.
knowledge.empty: Nothing yet. Add your first knowledge.

automations.title: Follow-ups
automations.intro: What Roavaa would follow up today. You decide and send.
automations.empty: Nothing to follow up. All clear.

msg.reminder: Remind {name} of the appointment and confirm the time.
msg.unanswered: Reply to {name}: the request is still waiting.
msg.post_repair: Ask {name} if all is well and request a Google review.
msg.reactivate: Reach out to {name} again with an offer.

newCustomer.title: New customer
newCustomer.intro: Add a customer, and a vehicle right away if you like.
newCustomer.vehicleHint: Leave empty to add only the customer.

home.title: Your digital head office
home.subtitle: A calm, considered workspace where your AI employee responds, organizes and learns, so no request is ever lost.

respond.title: Responds
respond.body: Every request gets an immediate, human and professional reply, day and night.

organize.title: Organizes
organize.body: Customers, vehicles and appointments are sorted on their own, without admin.

learn.title: Learns
learn.body: The system remembers your preferences and gets a little better every week.

memories.title: Three kinds of memory
memories.intro: Real intelligence comes from remembering at the right level.

garage.title: Company memory
garage.body: Knows your hours, your team, your tone and your preferences. Stays private to you.

trade.title: Trade memory
trade.body: Knows repairs, parts, emergencies and the questions common to the industry.

global.title: Shared memory
global.body: Learns anonymously which replies and reminders work best.

checklist.title: What this page verifies
checklist.intro: A small witness page to check the foundations.

phase.label: Phase 0
phase.note: Technical foundation only. No login, dashboard or real AI yet.

assistant.message: A new request from Ms. De Vries looks urgent. I've drafted a reply and proposed two time slots.

footer.rights: Internal foundation build. Not for production.

signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Get started with Roavaa for your garage.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: We will send you a reset link.

messages.checkEmail: Almost there. Check your email to confirm your account.
messages.resetSent: If that email exists, a reset link has been sent.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Check your details and try again.

request.title: Request your appointment
request.subtitle: Tell us briefly what is wrong with your car. We will get back to you soon.
request.privacy: By submitting, you agree that we may contact you about your request.
request.error: Something went wrong. Check your details and try again.
request.sentTitle: Thank you, your request has been sent.
request.sentBody: {garage} has received your request and will contact you soon.
request.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. my brakes have been squeaking for a week.

fields.description: What is wrong with your car?
